title: hypericum pallens
intro: Hypericum pallens, also known as small St John's wort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Hypericaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hypericum pallens include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The herbal preparations of Hypericum pallens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
